data.name: CHN001_Title
data.value: Comment contains Chinese characters

data.name: CHN001_MessageFormat
data.value: Comment content '{0}' contains Chinese characters

data.name: CHN001_Description
data.value: Comments should not contain Chinese text.

data.name: DLL002_Title
data.value: DllImport missing DefaultDllImportSearchPaths attribute

data.name: DLL002_MessageFormat
data.value: DllImport does not specify DefaultDllImportSearchPaths attribute

data.name: DLL002_Description
data.value: When using DllImport, you should specify the DefaultDllImportSearchPaths attribute.

data.name: DLL003_Title
data.value: Unsafe DLL signature

data.name: DLL003_MessageFormat
data.value: DLL file '{0}'

data.name: DLL003_Description
data.value: DLLs referenced via DllImport must have a valid digital signature.

data.name: EXC001_Title
data.value: Catch block should not print stack trace

data.name: EXC001_MessageFormat
data.value: Using {0} to get stack trace in catch block may leak sensitive information

data.name: EXC001_Description
data.value: When catching exceptions, avoid printing full stack traces. Log only necessary error messages.

data.name: CODE001_Title
data.value: Comment contains invalid code

data.name: CODE001_MessageFormat
data.value: Comment contains invalid code: {0}

data.name: CODE001_Description
data.value: Dead code that has been commented out should not be kept.

data.name: SEC001_Title
data.value: Sensitive information stored in plaintext

data.name: SEC001_MessageFormat
data.value: Sensitive information detected: {0} = "{1}"

data.name: SEC001_Description
data.value: Do not store passwords, tokens, keys, or other sensitive information in plaintext. Use configuration files or environment variables.

data.name: SEC002_Title
data.value: Uncontrolled search path (path traversal risk)

data.name: SEC002_MessageFormat
data.value: Uncontrolled search path detected: {0}

data.name: SEC002_Description
data.value: Never use user input directly as a path. This may lead to path traversal attacks. Validate that paths are within allowed directories.

data.name: SEC003_Title
data.value: Potential SQL injection risk

data.name: SEC003_MessageFormat
data.value: Detected dynamic SQL construction via {0}, SQL injection risk: {1}

data.name: SEC003_Description
data.value: Do not use string concatenation or interpolation to build SQL statements. Use parameterized queries or ORM frameworks.

data.name: SEC004_Title
data.value: Using unsafe deserialization

data.name: SEC004_MessageFormat
data.value: Unsafe deserialization detected: {0}, may lead to Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability

data.name: SEC004_Description
data.value: BinaryFormatter and JavaScriptSerializer have deserialization vulnerabilities. Use System.Text.Json instead. If using Newtonsoft.Json, set TypeNameHandling.None.

data.name: SEC005_Title
data.value: Using cryptographically insecure random number generator

data.name: SEC005_MessageFormat
data.value: Detected use of System.Random {0}, not suitable for security scenarios (tokens, keys). Use RandomNumberGenerator instead

data.name: SEC005_Description
data.value: System.Random uses pseudo-random algorithm and is not cryptographically secure. For generating tokens, keys, verification codes, and other security-sensitive scenarios, use RandomNumberGenerator.

data.name: SEC006_Title
data.value: Regex missing timeout parameter (ReDoS risk)

data.name: SEC006_MessageFormat
data.value: Detected {0} without timeout parameter. Complex regex may lead to Regular expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) attack

data.name: SEC006_Description
data.value: Always specify matchTimeout parameter when using Regex to prevent DoS attacks caused by exponential backtracking on malicious input.

data.name: SEC007_Title
data.value: IDisposable resource not managed with using statement (resource leak risk)

data.name: SEC007_MessageFormat
data.value: '{0}' implements IDisposable. Use using statement or using declaration to ensure resource disposal

data.name: SEC007_Description
data.value: Database connections, file streams, HttpClient, and other resources not properly disposed can lead to connection pool exhaustion, file handle leaks, etc.

data.name: SEC008_Title
data.value: Using predictable temp file name (race condition/file enumeration risk)

data.name: SEC008_MessageFormat
data.value: Detected predictable temp file name construction ({0}). Attacker can predict file path for race condition or symlink attacks

data.name: SEC008_Description
data.value: Use Path.GetTempFileName() or Path.Combine(Path.GetTempPath(), Path.GetRandomFileName()) to generate unpredictable temp file names.

data.name: SEC009_Title
data.value: Unsafe reflection usage

data.name: SEC009_MessageFormat
data.value: Unsafe reflection operation detected: {0}, may lead to arbitrary type loading or access control bypass

data.name: SEC009_Description
data.value: Do not use user input to dynamically load types or access non-public members. This may lead to code execution or information disclosure.

data.name: SEC010_Title
data.value: Thread synchronization/race condition risk

data.name: SEC010_MessageFormat
data.value: Potential race condition detected: {0}, may lead to data inconsistency or security vulnerabilities

data.name: SEC010_Description
data.value: Access to shared state should use lock, Interlocked, or thread-safe collections for synchronization.

data.name: SEC011_Title
data.value: Insecure IPC/remote call

data.name: SEC011_MessageFormat
data.value: Insecure communication configuration detected: {0}, data transmission is not encrypted

data.name: SEC011_Description
data.value: Remote calls should use HTTPS, TLS, or other encrypted transport. Avoid using insecure bindings or HTTP endpoints.

data.name: DLL003_UnknownDll
data.value: Unknown DLL name

data.name: DLL003_NotFoundInPath
data.value: {0} (not found in specified search path)

data.name: DLL003_InvalidSignature
data.value: {0} (invalid/unsigned signature)

data.name: CHN001_Title
data.value: Chinese content in comments

data.name: CHN001_MessageFormat
data.value: Comment '{0}' contains Chinese text

data.name: CHN001_Description
data.value: Code comments must not contain Chinese text

data.name: DLL002_Title
data.value: DllImport missing DefaultDllImportSearchPaths attribute

data.name: DLL002_MessageFormat
data.value: DllImport missing DefaultDllImportSearchPaths attribute

data.name: DLL002_Description
data.value: DefaultDllImportSearchPaths attribute should be specified when using DllImport

data.name: EXC001_Title
data.value: Stack trace should not be printed in catch block

data.name: EXC001_MessageFormat
data.value: Stack trace is obtained using {0} in catch block, which may leak sensitive information

data.name: EXC001_Description
data.value: Complete stack trace should not be printed when catching exceptions, only log necessary error messages

data.name: DLL003_Title
data.value: Unsafe DLL signature

data.name: DLL003_MessageFormat
data.value: DLL file '{0}'

data.name: DLL003_Description
data.value: DLL referenced by DllImport must have a valid digital signature

data.name: CODE001_Title
data.value: Comment contains invalid code

data.name: CODE001_MessageFormat
data.value: Comment contains invalid code: {0}

data.name: CODE001_Description
data.value: Commented out invalid code snippets should not be kept

data.name: SEC001_Title
data.value: Sensitive information stored in plain text

data.name: SEC001_MessageFormat
data.value: Sensitive information detected: {0} = "{1}"

data.name: SEC001_Description
data.value: Sensitive information like passwords, tokens, keys should not be stored in plain text in code. Use configuration files or environment variables instead

data.name: SEC002_Title
data.value: Uncontrolled search path (Path Traversal risk)

data.name: SEC002_MessageFormat
data.value: Uncontrolled search path detected: {0}

data.name: SEC002_Description
data.value: Never use user input directly as a path, as it may lead to path traversal attacks. Validate if the path is within the allowed directories

data.name: SEC003_Title
data.value: Potential SQL Injection risk

data.name: SEC003_MessageFormat
data.value: SQL injection risk detected. Dynamically built SQL statement using {0}: {1}

data.name: SEC003_Description
data.value: Do not use string concatenation or interpolation to dynamically build SQL statements. Use parameterized queries or ORM frameworks

data.name: SEC004_Title
data.value: Unsafe deserialization method used

data.name: SEC004_MessageFormat
data.value: Unsafe deserialization operation detected: {0}, which may lead to Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability

data.name: SEC004_Description
data.value: BinaryFormatter and JavaScriptSerializer have deserialization vulnerabilities. Use System.Text.Json instead. If using Newtonsoft.Json, TypeNameHandling.None must be set

data.name: SEC005_Title
data.value: Cryptographically insecure pseudo-random number generator used

data.name: SEC005_MessageFormat
data.value: Insecure System.Random {0} detected. Not suitable for security contexts (like token, key generation). Use RandomNumberGenerator instead

data.name: SEC005_Description
data.value: System.Random uses a pseudo-random algorithm and is not cryptographically secure. RandomNumberGenerator must be used in security-sensitive scenarios like generating tokens, keys, and verification codes

data.name: SEC006_Title
data.value: Regular expression missing timeout parameter (ReDoS risk)

data.name: SEC006_MessageFormat
data.value: Regular expression {0} missing timeout parameter. Complex regex may lead to Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS) attack

data.name: SEC006_Description
data.value: Always specify the matchTimeout parameter when using Regex to prevent backtracking explosions caused by malicious input leading to DoS attacks

data.name: SEC007_Title
data.value: IDisposable resource not managed by using statement (Resource Leak risk)

data.name: SEC007_MessageFormat
data.value: '{0}' implements IDisposable. Use a using statement or using declaration after creation to ensure the resource is disposed

data.name: SEC007_Description
data.value: Improper disposal of resources like database connections, file streams, and HttpClients can lead to connection pool exhaustion and file handle leaks

data.name: SEC008_Title
data.value: Predictable temporary file name used (Race Condition/File Enumeration risk)

data.name: SEC008_MessageFormat
data.value: Predictable temporary file name constructed using {0}. Attackers could predict the file path and launch a race condition or symlink attack

data.name: SEC008_Description
data.value: Use Path.GetTempFileName() or Path.Combine(Path.GetTempPath(), Path.GetRandomFileName()) to generate an unpredictable temporary file name.

data.name: SEC009_Title
data.value: Unsafe reflection usage

data.name: SEC009_MessageFormat
data.value: Unsafe reflection operation detected: {0}, which may lead to arbitrary type loading or access control bypass

data.name: SEC009_Description
data.value: Do not use user input to dynamically load types or access non-public members, as it may lead to code execution or information disclosure.

data.name: SEC010_Title
data.value: Thread synchronization/Race Condition risk

data.name: SEC010_MessageFormat
data.value: Potential race condition detected: {0}, which may lead to data inconsistency or security vulnerabilities

data.name: SEC010_Description
data.value: Access to shared state should be synchronized using lock, Interlocked, or thread-safe collections.

data.name: SEC011_Title
data.value: Unsafe IPC/Remote Call

data.name: SEC011_MessageFormat
data.value: Unsafe communication configuration detected: {0}, data transmission is not encrypted

data.name: SEC011_Description
data.value: Remote calls should use HTTPS, TLS or other encrypted transmission. Avoid using insecure bindings or HTTP endpoints.

data.name: DLL003_Arg_Unknown
data.value: Unknown DLL name

data.name: DLL003_Arg_NotFound
data.value: {0} (Not found in specified search paths)

data.name: DLL003_Arg_InvalidSig
data.value: {0} (Invalid signature / Unsigned)

data.name: SEC002_Arg_Method
data.value: Method {0} uses parameters that may contain user input, presenting a path traversal risk

data.name: SEC002_Arg_Concat
data.value: String concatenation constructs a path using values that may contain user input, presenting a path traversal risk

data.name: SEC002_Arg_Interpolation
data.value: String interpolation constructs a path using values that may contain user input, presenting a path traversal risk

data.name: SEC003_Arg_Interpolation
data.value: String interpolation ($"")

data.name: SEC003_Arg_Concat
data.value: String concatenation (+)

data.name: SEC004_Arg_NewType
data.value: new {0}() — This type has known RCE vulnerabilities

data.name: SEC004_Arg_HandlingUnsafe
data.value: TypeNameHandling = {0} (Only TypeNameHandling.None is safe)

data.name: SEC004_Arg_HandlingRecommend
data.value: TypeNameHandling = {0} (It is recommended to explicitly set it to TypeNameHandling.None)

data.name: SEC005_Arg_Construct
data.value: Construction

data.name: SEC005_Arg_MethodCall
data.value: Method call .{0}()

data.name: SEC006_Arg_NewRegex
data.value: new Regex(...)

data.name: SEC008_Arg_InterpPredictable
data.value: String interpolation contains predictable values ({0})

data.name: SEC008_Arg_InterpStructure
data.value: String interpolation ($"") constructs a predictable filename structure

data.name: SEC008_Arg_ConcatTimestamp
data.value: String concatenation contains a timestamp ({0})

data.name: SEC008_Arg_ConcatStructure
data.value: String concatenation (+) constructs a predictable filename structure

data.name: SEC008_Arg_FormatStructure
data.value: string.Format() constructs a predictable filename structure

data.name: SEC008_Arg_Timestamp1
data.value: Uses timestamp ({0}), which is predictable

data.name: SEC008_Arg_Timestamp2
data.value: Uses timestamp ({0}), which is predictable

data.name: SEC009_Arg_GetType
data.value: Type.GetType() uses a non-constant parameter and may load arbitrary types

data.name: SEC009_Arg_NonPublic
data.value: {0}() uses BindingFlags.NonPublic to access non-public members, potentially bypassing access control

data.name: SEC009_Arg_Invoke
data.value: When invoking a method via reflection (MethodInfo.Invoke), ensure the method name is not user-controlled

data.name: SEC010_Arg_Increment
data.value: Field increment operation (++) is not atomic, use Interlocked.Increment or lock

data.name: SEC010_Arg_Decrement
data.value: Field decrement operation (--) is not atomic, use Interlocked.Decrement or lock

data.name: SEC010_Arg_Compound
data.value: Field compound assignment operation ({0}) is not atomic, use Interlocked or lock

data.name: SEC010_Arg_CheckThenUse
data.value: check-then-use pattern detected: Field '{0}' is modified after a condition check, presenting a race condition risk

data.name: SEC010_Arg_CollectionMethod
data.value: The {0}() operation of a non-thread-safe collection should be executed inside a lock, or use a Concurrent collection

data.name: SEC010_Arg_CollectionIndexer
data.value: Indexer assignment on a non-thread-safe collection should be executed inside a lock, or use ConcurrentDictionary

data.name: SEC011_Arg_BasicHttp
data.value: BasicHttpBinding does not use encryption by default, consider using WSHttpBinding or configuring Transport security mode

data.name: SEC011_Arg_SecurityNone
data.value: {0} uses SecurityMode.None disabling security, data will be transmitted in plaintext

data.name: SEC011_Arg_HttpEndpoint
data.value: HTTP endpoint address used, data transmission is unencrypted, HTTPS is recommended

data.name: SEC011_Arg_GrpcHttp
data.value: gRPC channel uses an HTTP address, HTTPS is recommended to enable TLS encryption

data.name: SEC011_Arg_WebClientHttp
data.value: WebClient.{0}() uses an HTTP URL, data transmission is unencrypted
